ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., _18-39, _40-64) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "age_group_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_group_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "program_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program period */,
  "bene_yes" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries who have opted-in */,
  "bene_no" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries who have opted-out */,
  "total_bene" INTEGER /* Total number of beneficiaries */,
  "bene_yes_pct" REAL /* Percentage of beneficiaries who have opted-in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_program_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_period_id") REFERENCES program_periods ("program_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_periods" (
  "program_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program period */,
  "program_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the program period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program period was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the program period is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_beneficiaries" (
  "program_beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program beneficiary record */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "program_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program period */,
  "bene_yes" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries who have opted-in */,
  "bene_no" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries who have opted-out */,
  "total_bene" INTEGER /* Total number of beneficiaries */,
  "bene_yes_pct" REAL /* Percentage of beneficiaries who have opted-in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_beneficiaries_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_beneficiaries_program_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_period_id") REFERENCES program_periods ("program_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the beneficiary statistics */,
  "program_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program period */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the beneficiary statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_period_id") REFERENCES program_periods ("program_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the program is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiary_details" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the beneficiary */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the beneficiary */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the beneficiary */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the beneficiary */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the beneficiary */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the beneficiary */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the beneficiary */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beneficiary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the beneficiary record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the beneficiary record is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)
